chapter_title.ar: باب الْقِيَامِ وَ الْقُعُودِ فِي الصَّلَاةِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 29 – The standing and the sitting during the Salāt

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مختلف فيه - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5/159)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مختلف فيه - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5/159)
text: سَمِعْتُهُ يَقُولُ كَانَ عَلِيُّ بْنُ الْحُسَيْنِ ( عليه السلام ) إِذَا هَوَى سَاجِداً انْكَبَّ وَ هُوَ يُكَبِّرُ .

en.hubeali: Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Husayn Bin Saeed, from Fazalat Bin Ayoub, from Moalla Abu Usman, from Moalla Bin Khunays,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws, said, ‘I heard himasws saying: ‘Aliasws Bin Al-Husaynasws while going down for Sajdah, would was exclaim Takbīr’.
en.sarwar: 5. Ahmad ibn Muhammad has narrated from al-Husayn ibn Sa‘id from Fadalah ibn Ayyub from Mu‘alla’ abu ‘Uthman from Mu‘alla’ ibn Khunayth who has said the following: “I once heard abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, say, ‘Ali ibn al-Husayn, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, while bowing down for Sajdah (prostration) would say Takbir (Allah is great beyond description).”’ (Ahadith 4-5 are best be explained by fatwa.)
